final:
module adc_controller(  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire reset,  
    input wire [15:0] adc_input,  
    output reg [7:0] adc_output  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (reset) begin  
            adc_output <= 8'b0;  
        end else begin  
            adc_output <= adc_input[15:8];  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
